(1) Includes shares sold but not yet settled as of July 10, 2026.

(2) The total face value of the shares of preferred stock sold, which is used to calculate dividends thereon.

(3) Net proceeds are presented net of sales commission.

(4) As previously disclosed, on March 23, 2026, Strategy announced a new $21.0 billion offering of MSTR Stock.
